name: Ninja Art: Face Step
outcome: [AttackerName] presses [AttackerHisOrHer] stocking clad foot down on [TargetName]'s face, forcing [TargetHimOrHer] to breathe in the surprisingly sweet scent of [AttackerHisOrHer] clothes as [AttackerHeOrShe] grinds her heel down.
miss: [AttackerName] presses [AttackerHisOrHer] stocking clad foot down on [TargetName]'s face, but [TargetHeOrShe] manages to ignore her rather humiliating attack.
statusOutcome: As [TargetName] is forced to smell the potently feminine fragrance of [AttackerName]'s foot, [TargetHisOrHer] head begins to feel floaty, empty, and faintly submissive, and [TargetHeOrShe] begins to idly wonder if her stockings are coated in some kind of drug... [TargetName] is charmed!
